commit.message:
Fix Go version mismatch causing release notes failure (#469)

The release notes script failed because go.work required Go 1.25.5
while the knative/release workflow uses Go 1.24.x with GOTOOLCHAIN=local.

This was caused by PR #439 which incorrectly bumped build/go.mod and
go.work to 1.25.5 while leaving the main go.mod at 1.24.2.

This commit aligns all Go versions to 1.24.2 to fix the issue.

Fixes: Release notes generation failure
Assisted-by: 🤖 Claude Opus/Sonnet 4.5

verification.payload:

pullRequests.title: Fix Go version mismatch causing release notes failure
pullRequests.body:
## Problem

The release notes script failed during the latest release with the error:
```
go: go.work requires go >= 1.25.5 (running go 1.24.12; GOTOOLCHAIN=local)
```

This occurred because the knative/release workflow uses Go 1.24.x with `GOTOOLCHAIN=local`, which prevents automatic toolchain downloads.

## Root Cause

PR #439 ("[main] Upgrade to latest dependencies") merged on Jan 20, 2026, incorrectly bumped:
- `go.work` from 1.24.0 to 1.25.5
- `build/go.mod` from 1.24.0 to 1.25.5

While leaving the main `go.mod` at 1.24.2, creating a version mismatch.

The bump was triggered by knobots automation updating OpenTelemetry dependencies that dropped Go 1.23 support, but the automation incorrectly applied the version bump to workspace files.

## Solution

This PR aligns all Go version declarations to 1.24.2:
- `go.work`: 1.25.5 → 1.24.2
- `build/go.mod`: 1.25.5 → 1.24.2
- `go.mod`: 1.24.2 (unchanged)

## Verification

✅ Verified with `GOTOOLCHAIN=local go list -mod=readonly -m all` (matches release workflow)
✅ Full build passes: `./mage build` (all 72 tests passing)
✅ All CI checks should now pass

Assisted-by: 🤖 Claude Sonnet 4.5

pullRequests.title: Replace Mage build system with shell scripts
pullRequests.body:
Replace the Mage build system with shell scripts, removing the need for `go.work` and aligning with other kn-plugin repositories.
@gauron99 and me noticed this during the 1.21 release as the release note generator failed because of this, see https://github.com/knative/release/actions/runs/21472474854/job/61848195238 .

Entirely coded with Claude but looked good to me.

## Changes

- Add `hack/build.sh` for local development builds
- Add `hack/build-flags.sh` for ldflags generation
- Add `hack/publish.sh` for e2e test image publishing
- Update `hack/release.sh` to build without Mage
- Update `.github/workflows/go.yml` to use `hack/build.sh`
- Remove `go.work`, `go.work.sum`, `build/` module, and `mage` script
- Remove `pkg/metadata/reflect.go` and unused path functions
- Update `.gitignore` to exclude built binaries
- Update `test/e2e-tests.sh` to use `hack/publish.sh` instead of `./mage publish`

## Why

The Mage build system required a separate `build/` Go module that imported from the main module, necessitating `go.work`. This added complexity that other kn-plugin repositories avoid by using simple shell scripts.

## Comparison with other kn-plugins

| Aspect          | kn-plugin-event (before) | kn-plugin-event (after) | kn-plugin-admin   | kn-plugin-quickstart |
| --------------- | ------------------------ | ----------------------- | ----------------- | -------------------- |
| `go.work`       | Yes                      | **No**                  | No                | No                   |
| `build/` module | Yes                      | **No**                  | No                | No                   |
| Build entry     | `./mage`                 | **`./hack/build.sh`**   | `./hack/build.sh` | `./hack/build.sh`    |
| Build flags     | Reflection-based         | **ldflags injection**   | ldflags injection | ldflags injection    |

## Script sources

The new scripts are based on kn-plugin-admin's implementation, adapted for this repo:

| Script                | Source                          | Adaptations                                                                                                       |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `hack/build-flags.sh` | kn-plugin-admin                 | Different variables (`Version`, `ImageBasename` vs `BuildDate`, `Version`, `GitRevision`); hardcoded package path |
| `hack/build.sh`       | kn-plugin-admin (339→208 lines) | Removed: `--watch`, `--codegen`, license check, vendor sourcing; removed `-mod=vendor` (no vendor dir)            |
| `hack/release.sh`     | Original structure kept         | Replaced `./mage clean publish` with `ko build` + `go build`                                                      |
| `hack/publish.sh`     | New                             | Simple `ko build` wrapper for e2e tests                                                                           |

Key adaptations for kn-plugin-event:

- Different metadata variables (includes `ImageBasename` for the companion sender image)
- No vendor directory, so no `-mod=vendor` flag
- Builds container image via `ko` in release (unique among kn-plugins)

## How it works

Version and image metadata are now injected via `-ldflags` at build time:

- `Version`: from `TAG` env var or git-derived (`vYYYYMMDD-local-<hash>`)
- `ImageBasename`: from `IMAGE_BASENAME` or `KO_DOCKER_REPO` env var

The existing `ResolveImage()` function constructs the full image reference at runtime:

```
${ImageBasename}/kn-event-sender:${Version}
```

## Testing

```bash
# Build
./hack/build.sh --fast

# Verify version output
./kn-event version
# kn-event version: v20260202-local-6ec81c08
# sender image: ghcr.io/knative-extensions/kn-plugin-event/kn-event-sender:v20260202-local-6ec81c08

# Cross-compile
./hack/build.sh --all
```

pullRequests.title: [Automated] Update knative/community files
pullRequests.body:
Produced via:
```shell
# meta: knative/community
# main: knative-sandbox/kn-plugin-event
FILE="OWNERS_ALIASES"
if [ "knative-sandbox" != "knative" ] ; then
  FILE="knative-sandbox-OWNERS_ALIASES"
fi
if [ -f "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/meta/${FILE}" ] ; then
  cp "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/meta/${FILE}" "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/main/OWNERS_ALIASES"
fi
```
Cron. -vaikas
/cc knative-sandbox/client-writers
/assign knative-sandbox/client-writers

releases.body:
## Dependencies

### Added

releases.name: v1.17.1
releases.body:
v1.17.1

knative-extensions/kn-plugin-event@release-1.17
## Changes by Kind

### Enhancement

- The errors are easier to debug because the in-cluster jobs and their pods are logged and users are directed to them. (#375, @cardil)

## Dependencies

### Added

releases.name: v1.17.0
releases.body:
knative-extensions/kn-plugin-event@release-1.17
## Changes by Kind

### Enhancement

- The errors are easier to debug because the in-cluster jobs and their pods are logged and users are directed to them. (#375, @cardil)

## Dependencies

### Added
